home.title: Main Operations Dashboard
home.description: This page is the unified entry point for all platform roles. From here you can jump directly to parent, student, teacher, and admin experiences.

roleSection.title: Platform Interfaces
roleSection.description: Each interface is designed for a specific role and daily workflow.

quickSection.title: Common Tasks
quickSection.description: Fast shortcuts to the most-used pages.

roleCards.title: Parent Portal
roleCards.description: Track student progress, weekly reports, attendance, and subscription details.

roleCards.title: Student Dashboard
roleCards.description: Daily tasks, voice practice, live class, and rewards.

roleCards.title: Teacher Hub
roleCards.description: Smart session prep, student profiles, reports, and fast actions.

roleCards.title: Admin Panel
roleCards.description: Manage students, teachers, schedules, curriculum, and subscriptions.

quickActions.title: Placement test
quickActions.description: A quick assessment to identify the best learning path before starting.

quickActions.title: Pricing plans
quickActions.description: Review package options and pick the suitable plan for each age group.

quickActions.title: Curriculum
quickActions.description: Browse levels and curriculum units tailored for Arab children.

classroom.starMessage: Your teacher sent you an encouragement star!

dailyPractice.title: Today activity in 5 to 10 minutes
dailyPractice.description: Short flow: listen, choose, then check. Designed to avoid fatigue.
dailyPractice.questionDescription: Listen to the word, then pick the correct image.
dailyPractice.pronunciationDescription: Hear the word then record your voice. The goal is confidence, not perfection.
dailyPractice.sortingDescription: I / like / apples -> reorder it to I like apples.

liveClass.title: Live class
liveClass.description: Student live-class experience with teacher video and simple tools.

rewards.title: Stars and achievements
rewards.description: Track stars, streaks, and badges earned through daily effort.
rewards.galleryDescription: Each badge reflects a real step in your learning journey.

voicePractice.title: Voice recording
voicePractice.sentenceTip: Listen slowly, then say it once or twice.

childProgress.title: {{name}} progress
childProgress.description: Parents can clearly see current progress, completed outcomes, and next learning stage.
childProgress.scoreNote: Good monthly improvement. Extra pronunciation support is still needed.
childProgress.planDescription: A clear timeline from current stage to final term evaluation.

audioProgress.title: Before and after recordings
audioProgress.description: Compare voice samples with short teacher notes.
audioProgress.summary: The student now has clearer short-sentence pronunciation, but still needs V sound support.

sessions.title: Sessions and package
sessions.description: A simple view of upcoming and completed sessions for parents.

billing.title: Package and payment
billing.description: Subscriptions are term-based, not monthly. Choose one term minimum or annual (three terms).

sessionBrief.title: AI session brief: {{id}}
sessionBrief.description: Instant AI-synthesized context for your upcoming session.

sessionLive.title: AI assessment studio
sessionLive.description: Integrated live session environment with real-time support.

sessionSummary.title: AI assessment synthesis
sessionSummary.description: Finalize rubric and send parent reports in under a minute.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.description: Welcome to the admin dashboard. Here is today’s platform performance summary.
dashboard.newStudentJoinedDesc: A new account was registered by Ahmed Mohammed in grade 10.

students.title: Students management
students.description: Core MVP student table: profile, level, plan, and status.

teachers.title: Teachers management
teachers.description: Teacher cards for specialty, accent, capacity, rating, and current load.

schedule.title: Schedule management
schedule.description: Initial weekly scheduling interface with overload alerting.

curriculum.title: Curriculum and tracks
curriculum.description: Manage units and lessons in a simple first version.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions overview
subscriptions.description: Connect progress quality to retention and renewal expectations.
